summary: Tested 'Currently saved:' enhancement in Bulk Category Editor. All features VERIFIED WORKING. Categories, Filters, and Specifications sections now show 'Currently saved:' with per-value product counts and 'Mixed' badges when products have different values.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Currently saved:' enhancement is fully implemented and working. Key verification points: (1) Categories section shows 'Currently saved:' with sub_category names and counts (e.g., 'Floor Tiles (26)', 'Wall & Floor Tiles (24)'), (2) Filter headers show 'Mixed' badge when products have different values, (3) Inside expanded filters, 'Currently saved:' appears with value counts, (4) Specifications section shows 'Currently saved:' with values and counts for Material, Finish, Thickness, Size, etc. (e.g., 'Porcelain (29)', 'Engineered Wood (2)'), (5) Scope Summary Panel still renders correctly at bottom showing '18 attributes' and '13 partially applied', (6) Orange scope badges persist after save (P0 bug fix verified in iteration_83).

verified_working.product_selection: SUCCESS - Products can be selected via checkboxes
verified_working.bulk_category_editor_opens: SUCCESS - Modal opens when clicking 'Edit Categories' button
verified_working.categories_currently_saved: SUCCESS - Shows 'Currently saved:' with sub_category names and counts (Floor Tiles (26), Wall & Floor Tiles (24), Kitchen Tiles (24), Large Format (2), Outdoor Tiles (1), Wall Tiles (1), Stone Effect (1))
verified_working.categories_mixed_badge: SUCCESS - Shows 'Mixed' badge when products have different sub_categories
verified_working.filters_mixed_badge: SUCCESS - Filter headers show 'Mixed' badge when values differ
verified_working.filters_currently_saved: SUCCESS - Inside expanded filters, 'Currently saved:' appears with value counts
verified_working.specifications_currently_saved: SUCCESS - Shows 'Currently saved:' with values and counts (Porcelain (29), Engineered Wood (2), Laminate (1), Ceramic (1))
verified_working.specifications_mixed_badge: SUCCESS - Shows 'Mixed' badge when products have different values
verified_working.specifications_already_set: SUCCESS - Shows 'Already set:' with counts (Material: 33/35, Finish: 35/35, Edge: 1/35, Origin: 4/35, Slip Rating: 1/35, Thickness: 10/35, Size: 35/35)
verified_working.scope_summary_panel: SUCCESS - Found with data-testid='scope-summary-panel', shows '18 attributes' and '13 partially applied'
verified_working.backend_products_api: SUCCESS - /api/supplier-sync/products returns products with sub_categories, finish, material, thickness, size, colors fields

feature_verification.feature_name: Currently saved: display with per-value product counts
key_elements_verified: Categories section: 'Currently saved:' with sub_category names and counts
Filter headers: 'Mixed' badge when values differ
Inside filters: 'Currently saved:' with value counts
Specifications: 'Currently saved:' with value counts for Material, Finish, Thickness, Size
Specifications: 'Mixed' badge when products have different values
Scope Summary Panel: Still renders correctly at bottom
feature_verification.verification_result: FULLY IMPLEMENTED - All features working as specified
